architecture_findings.summary: Multi-cloud estate spans 3 providers with 14 workloads. Key concerns: 2 oversized EC2 instances, 1 publicly accessible RDS, missing observability on Azure VMs.

findings.title: Severely underutilized compute
findings.detail: m5.4xlarge running at avg 12% CPU over 30 days. Rightsizing to m5.xlarge saves ~$657/mo.
findings.recommendation: Schedule rightsizing during next maintenance window.

findings.title: RDS publicly accessible in production
findings.detail: publicly_accessible=true on a production database. Violates IAC-013 and SOC 2 CC6.6.
findings.recommendation: Set publicly_accessible=false and route via VPC peering or RDS Proxy.

findings.title: No Azure Monitor agent deployed
findings.detail: Azure VMs are missing the Azure Monitor agent extension. No metrics flowing to Log Analytics workspace.
findings.recommendation: Deploy AzureMonitorWindowsAgent via Azure Policy assignment.

findings.title: Staging instance running 24/7
findings.detail: Staging VM in europe-west1 has no scheduled shutdown. Estimated $55/mo could be saved with a stop schedule.
findings.recommendation: Create a Cloud Scheduler job to stop/start gce-backend-02 outside business hours.

compliance_violations.framework: CIS AWS Foundations Benchmark v1.5 + SOC 2 Type II

violations.title: EBS encryption at rest not enabled
violations.remediation: Enable EBS default encryption in us-east-1: aws ec2 enable-ebs-encryption-by-default

violations.title: CloudTrail log file validation disabled
violations.remediation: Enable log file validation: aws cloudtrail update-trail --name main-trail --enable-log-file-validation

violations.title: Root account has active access keys
violations.remediation: Delete root access keys immediately. Use IAM roles for all programmatic access.

violations.title: Production database publicly accessible
violations.remediation: Set publicly_accessible=false and restrict security group to application tier CIDR only.

violations.title: Security group allows unrestricted SSH
violations.remediation: Restrict SSH ingress to corporate IP ranges or use AWS Systems Manager Session Manager.

finops_anomalies.description: EC2 spend spike: $135.94 on 2025-01-18 vs $28.32 daily average (+380%). Likely runaway batch job or misconfigured autoscaling.
Dev RDS instance running continuously over the holiday period (Dec 24 – Jan 2). No traffic detected. Estimated $32 wasted.
finops_anomalies.note: Pattern anomaly: should have been stopped during company shutdown.

finops_anomalies.description: S3 data transfer out jumped 3x on Jan 15. No corresponding application traffic. Possible data exfiltration or misconfigured public endpoint.

recent_incidents.title: EC2 cost spike — m5.4xlarge runaway process
recent_incidents.root_cause: Batch job loop bug caused 480% CPU spike. No autoscaling cap configured.

recent_incidents.title: Production RDS failover — unexpected Multi-AZ promotion
recent_incidents.root_cause: Brief network partition in us-east-1a triggered automatic failover to us-east-1b.

recent_incidents.title: API Gateway 502 errors — certificate expiry
recent_incidents.root_cause: TLS certificate on api-gateway expired. Renewal automation was not configured.

top_risks: No MFA on 3 IAM users with AdministratorAccess
